headline: Alone in Moscow: How the Russian resistance tries to survive under Putin
description: 'Resisting a repressive regime' (1/3). Since the invasion of Ukraine, a group of 'invisibles' – anonymous journalists, lawyers and activists – have been gathering information about the fate of thousands of political prisoners sentenced to lengthy prison terms for having challenged the Russian leader.

headline: Who is rich in France?

Pascal Ory, historian: Edgar Morin's 'acute sensitivity to the spirit of the times made him a trailblazer'
description: The member of the Académie Française pays tribute to sociologist Edgar Morin, who died on Friday at the age of 104, highlighting how Morin's life and work were driven by an enduring urge to experiment.

headline: Ripped by a storm, JR's Paris bridge 'cavern' hangs in the balance
description: The mountain landscape that had been set up on the Pont-Neuf now flutters in the wind. The opening of the monumental installation has been postponed.

headline: Like PSG, the Knicks successfully rebuilt by ditching superstars
description: The New York Knicks open the NBA finals on Wednesday against Victor Wembanyama's Spurs. Much like Paris Saint-Germain, the Knicks had to reinvent themselves after years of frustration.

headline: Bayeux Tapestry's transport to British Museum will be safe, detailed study determines
description: Before the fragile 70-meter-long embroidery is transported to the United Kingdom in July, a new risk assessment study released on Wednesday has given the move the green light.

description: The city of Neuilly-sur-Seine outside Paris has the highest proportion of very wealthy households in France, according to a study by the Inequality Observatory published on Tuesday. The ranking is dominated by the western suburbs of Paris and the areas surrounding Geneva.

headline: Europe once again signals openness to dialogue with Putin
description: European countries seek to reopen a channel of communication with Russia, with France first among them, at a time when the US appears to be losing interest in the war in Ukraine.

headline: The Fontainebleau Forest's ever-growing popularity threatens this jewel of biodiversity near Paris
description: Managers of the forest complex are wondering how to deal with the increasing influx of visitors: Will development contain overtourism or encourage it?
